ops.body: Landed across 6 cc-context commits, all CI green: 2aad2f57 (3a DRY+conftest), 5702b5c1 (3b public-surface tests), 1e7757fd (3c de-underscore, 0 single-underscore defs remain), c6f27462 (3d split search_guards→search_common/grep_guards/rg_guards + command_rewrites→sed/headtail/cat/ls/find, identical hook count), 46fd6403 (Phase 1 guard fix), fcfe4155/601ffbb5 (Phase 2 Python styleguide). Adversarial review (codex finder+refuter) found 3 grep-guard bugs, all fixed+verified: 16e10ab8 (interval leading/stacking + 32767 ceiling + recursion) then 6db13562 (narrowed recursion to output-bounded only, after CI caught over-block of grep -rn on a small file). 474 pytest + capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test green (5 remaining failures are the separate cc-notes pack drift, task 4e0b9ac; 1 import error is the unreleased-symbol skew, task ebf5434 — neither is cc-context).
